mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO card_risk_features ( card_id, authorization_count, approved_count, declined_count, last_decision_at ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, 1, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DECLINED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, #{decidedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE authorization_count = authorization_count + 1, approved_count = approved_count + CASE WHEN #{status} = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, declined_count = declined_count + CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DECLINED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
last_decision_at = GREATEST(last_decision_at, #{decidedAt})
